message:
feat: add Cobra CLI framework

Replace simple version check with Cobra-based CLI providing:
- Root command with proper help text
- Version subcommand showing version, commit, and build date
- Foundation for future subcommands

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,17 +1,6 @@
 // cmd/stockyard/main.go
 package main
 
-import (
-	"fmt"
-	"os"
-
-	"github.com/obra/stockyard/pkg/version"
-)
-
 func main() {
-	if len(os.Args) > 1 && os.Args[1] == "version" {
-		fmt.Printf("stockyard %s\n", version.Version)
-		os.Exit(0)
-	}
-	fmt.Println("stockyard - coding agent VM orchestrator")
+	Execute()
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+// cmd/stockyard/root.go
+package main
+
+import (
+	"fmt"
+	"os"
+
+	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
+)
+
+var rootCmd = &cobra.Command{
+	Use:   "stockyard",
+	Short: "Coding agent VM orchestrator",
+	Long:  `Stockyard runs coding agents in isolated Firecracker micro-VMs with ZFS-based audit trail snapshots.`,
+}
+
+func Execute() {
+	if err := rootCmd.Execute(); err != nil {
+		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, err)
+		os.Exit(1)
+	}
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+// cmd/stockyard/version.go
+package main
+
+import (
+	"fmt"
+
+	"github.com/obra/stockyard/pkg/version"
+	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
+)
+
+var versionCmd = &cobra.Command{
+	Use:   "version",
+	Short: "Print version information",
+	Run: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) {
+		fmt.Printf("stockyard %s\n", version.Version)
+		fmt.Printf("  commit: %s\n", version.GitCommit)
+		fmt.Printf("  built:  %s\n", version.BuildDate)
+	},
+}
+
+func init() {
+	rootCmd.AddCommand(versionCmd)
+}

@@ -1,3 +1,10 @@
 module github.com/obra/stockyard
 
 go 1.22.2
+
+require github.com/spf13/cobra v1.10.2
+
+require (
+	github.com/inconshreveable/mousetrap v1.1.0 // indirect
+	github.com/spf13/pflag v1.0.9 // indirect
+)
